message:
fix(fp-frame): fix negative timedelta round-trip bug in parse_hms

Formatting -3661 seconds produced "-01:01:01", but parsing it back
via parse_hms gave -3539 instead of -3661. The bug: parse_hms
interpreted "-01:01:01" as (-1)*3600 + 1*60 + 1 = -3539, treating
the sign as applying only to hours while minutes/seconds stayed
positive.

Fixed by detecting a negative first component and applying the sign
to the entire absolute total: -(1*3600 + 1*60 + 1) = -3661.

Added regression test verifying -3661 round-trips correctly through
to_timedelta -> timedelta_total_seconds.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
